_doc: Execution-strategy tests for the skill's parallelism guidance. SKILL.md tells the agent to fan out one sub-agent per file within a dependency layer when a PACKAGE has more than ~3 files to convert, and to stay sequential below that. A judge reads the live SKILL.md and classifies each task as 'parallel' (fan out sub-agents per layer) or 'sequential', scored against expect. Guards against a real-use regression we saw: the agent converted a whole package serially because the skill never told it to parallelize. Run via lib/parallelism.sh — one batched claude -p call.
